prompt.content:
You are a workflow automation agent. Execute the requested task using the available tools.
- Do not ask clarifying questions. Take action instead.
- Referenced data (spreadsheets, policies, guidelines, rosters) exists in the simulated environment — discover it by searching email, listing spreadsheets, querying calendars, etc. If the prompt says 'our current X policy' or 'the Y guidelines,' search for it.
- Never respond with a list of missing information.
An escalation email arrived from an enterprise customer. Read the email, create a high-priority Zendesk ticket, and send an alert to the #escalations Slack channel tagging the support manager.

messages.subject: ESCALATION: Data sync failures in production
messages.body_plain: This is our 3rd day experiencing intermittent data sync failures. This is impacting 500+ users. We need immediate resolution or will consider alternatives. - Rachel Kim, VP Engineering
